name: Basic Pancakes Mix (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make your own nutritious, homemade pancake mix. Store the dry mix in an airtight container—add the wet ingredients when you are ready to prepare the pancakes.
2. Combine the dry mix with the beaten egg, milk (or water), and oil. Do not overmix; the batter will be slightly lumpy.
3. Heat a TEFLON pan or other nonstick-coated pan sprayed with cooking spray over medium heat.
4. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake onto the heated pan.
5. When the cakes are bubbly on top and brown on the bottom, flip them and cook on the other side until browned.
- Flip carefully to avoid spattering.
- Brown evenly on both sides.
